use_cases: Primary navigation for SaaS dashboard applications
Settings and account management section navigation
Admin panel or control center navigation systems
ai_summary: An animated horizontal menu bar component featuring five navigation items (dashboard, notifications, settings, help, security) with custom SVG icons. The component uses smooth CSS transitions to animate the active indicator between menu items, providing visual feedback on selection. Designed with a dark theme and minimalist iconography, it's ideal for SaaS applications, admin panels, and developer tools requiring clean, animated navigation.
